publications.title: Study on the Reach and Effectiveness of Early Warning Systems in Timor-Leste
publications.description: This study evaluates the effectiveness of early warning systems in Timor-Leste, based on household surveys and focus group discussions across eight municipalities and key informant interviews with national, municipal and community stakeholders.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster sesilience of MSMEs in Barbados
publications.description: Strengthening the Disaster Resilience of MSMEs in Barbados

publications.title: Sendai Framework Monitoring in Europe and Central Asia
publications.description: This report offers a snapshot of the aggregated data reported by Member States across the Europe and Central Asia region. It is based on data reported in the SFM system by 20 July 2025, following a previous edition of this report released in December 2020

publications.title: Flames of change II special report: Children and youth at the forefront of tackling urban heat
publications.description: This special report focuses on the important role that children and youth can play in tackling urban heat and the urban heat island effect. Both top-down and bottom-up approaches are highlighted to showcase comprehensive strategies in action.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Barcelona: landscape assessment study
publications.description: This landscape study aims to assess the current state of SME disaster preparedness, identify capability and resource gaps, and inform targeted interventions, particularly around business continuity plans (BCPs), access to finance and capacity-building.

publications.title: Twenty-third session of the Africa Working Group for Disaster Risk Reduction
publications.description: This outcome document summarises the main achievements of the 23rd Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction, held from 11 to 13 November 2025 in Victoria Falls.

publications.title: UNDRR Work Programme 2026-27
publications.description: This Work Programme for 2026-2027 translates the ambitions of the Strategic Framework into the concrete actions UNDRR will take to lead, empower and accelerate global efforts to reduce disaster risk and safeguard development gains.

publications.title: Burkina Faso 2025 – Anticipatory finance snapshot
publications.description: This snapshot provides an overview of Anticipatory finance in Burkina Faso, with a particular focus on its linkages to disaster risk reduction (DRR), climate change adaptation (CCA) and humanitarian action.

publications.title: Pathways to resilience:  Stories from MCR2030 Cities
publications.description: This report captures the stories shared by MCR2030 cities through the online dashboard, providing a snapshot of city progress along the Resilience Roadmap and highlighting case examples that may serve as inspiration and guidance for other cities.

publications.title: The Disaster Resilience Scorecard for Cities – Action Guide. Chapter 1: Overview of the survey results
publications.description: This action guide aims to support local governments in developing and implementing an action plan to address gaps identified in their resilience strategies based on the results from the use of the UNDRR Disaster Resilience Scorecard for Cities.
